name.zhCN: Expo Tailwind CSS v4 配置

summary.original: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 in Expo with react-native-css and NativeWind v5 for universal styling
summary.zhCN: 在 Expo 中使用 react-native-css、NativeWind v5 和 Tailwind CSS v4，为 iOS、Android 与 Web 配置通用样式。

description.original: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 in Expo with react-native-css and NativeWind v5 for universal styling Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 在 Expo 中使用 react-native-css、NativeWind v5 和 Tailwind CSS v4，为 iOS、Android 与 Web 配置通用样式。Agent-OPT 将固定版本的官方 SKILL.md 及完整简体中文译文适配为专属 Web 技能工作室，支持任务执行手册、章节导航、全文检索和沙箱化只读渲染；不执行上游脚本，也不访问外部账号。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA d37fe3298bd003ee44df6636dc8ebc970a4f1b65.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier MIT recorded from plugins/expo/LICENSE. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备任务专属 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有界的用户目标和上下文，对固定版本技能的各章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的前提下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
Complete Simplified Chinese translation: catalog/skill-bodies/skill-expo-tailwind-setup/SKILL.zh-CN.md; the original SKILL.md remains unchanged.
Frontmatter keys, fenced code blocks, commands, paths, links, and technical identifiers were preserved during review.

features: Expo Tailwind 配置任务 with two skill-specific task examples
版本与现有样式栈 and bounded private context input
Expo Tailwind 配置包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: Expo Tailwind 配置任务 input
版本与现有样式栈 panel
Expo Tailwind 配置包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-expo-tailwind-setup: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-expo-tailwind-setup: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-expo-tailwind-setup: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-expo-tailwind-setup] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-expo-tailwind-setup; result=passed
skill-expo-tailwind-setup: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
